contexts.name: Home, App Shell & Transitions
contexts.description: The landing rozcestník that introduces the case study, justifies the Next.js stack and links to every task page, plus the global HTML shell and the per-navigation fade transition wrapping every route.

contexts.name: Header & Footer Navigation
contexts.description: Lets visitors move through the case study: a site-wide header and footer plus a documentation-style prev/next task pager, all driven by one typed navigation model so links never drift. The header also hosts a system-aware light/dark theme toggle.

contexts.name: Dashboard Workspace & KPIs
contexts.description: Interactive performance dashboard for the client: headline KPI cards (visits, cost, conversions, revenue, PNO) with period switching, period-over-period delta badges, a monthly revenue-goal pacing card with a seasonality-aware month-end forecast, and auto-generated insights.

contexts.name: Trend Chart & Channel Breakdown
contexts.description: Dependency-free SVG trend chart with switchable metrics and a faint previous-period overlay (period-over-period delta in the hover tooltip), plus the channel-mix table that breaks the selected period down by marketing channel and reconciles to the headline totals.

contexts.name: Metrics Analytics Engine
contexts.description: Pure analytics layer that turns the daily time series into totals, equal-length period comparisons, chart buckets and channel rows, with the metric metadata (labels, formats, good-direction) the UI renders.

contexts.name: Performance Dataset & Seed
contexts.description: The JSON 'database' behind the dashboard plus the seeded PRNG generator that produces a reproducible, internally-consistent two-year daily series (visits, cost, conversions, revenue).

contexts.name: LLM Wrapper Test Gate
contexts.description: The pre-commit gate that keeps the AI layer honest: it verifies every LLM call site goes through the wrapper chokepoint and is tagged + test-registered, then runs the real Claude wrapper test suite only when LLM code changed (cached by content hash) so the slow model calls don't repeat needlessly.

contexts.name: AI Assistant Workspace
contexts.description: The tabbed AI workspace page hosting the three marketing tools in one interface, with shared form/result primitives, a copy-prompt transparency panel and a request-lifecycle hook with an animated loading timer and 30s timeout. Includes the Playwright e2e suite for the page.

contexts.name: AI Tool Forms (Ads, Brief, Analysis)
contexts.description: The three client-side tool forms: a PPC ad generator with Google Ads/Sklik character-limit checks, a Google-style Ad Strength meter and a live responsive-search-ad preview; an SEO content brief builder with a search-result preview; and a performance analysis tool grounded in the dashboard data.

contexts.name: AI Generation Tools & API
contexts.description: The server-only AI tools and their single /api/ai endpoint: ads, SEO brief, performance analysis and campaign evaluation, each with JSON-schema structured output, request validation and a dataset snapshot that grounds the analysis prompt in real dashboard numbers.

contexts.name: LLM Provider Wrapper
contexts.description: The single chokepoint for every AI call: one generateStructured() entry point that switches provider by environment — Claude Code CLI (Sonnet via subscription) in development, Google Gemini in production — stamps the result with the active model and degrades to a deterministic demo when no provider is configured.

contexts.name: Article Reading Experience
contexts.description: The published article page: breadcrumb trail, a typed renderer for structured blocks (headings, lists, callouts, CTAs, lazy next/image figures), hover-to-copy heading permalink anchors that sync the TOC highlight, a sticky table of contents, a reading-progress bar, a UTM-tagged share + copy-link bar, an FAQ accordion and Article/ImageObject/Breadcrumb/FAQ JSON-LD.

contexts.name: Headless Article Content
contexts.description: The headless-CMS content model for the article: structured JSON in the repo plus the typed loader that derives the table of contents and FAQ schema, keeps internal/external/anchor links first-class, and supports figure/image blocks promoted into the Article JSON-LD graph as ImageObject nodes.

contexts.name: Campaign Console UI
contexts.description: Client-side console for the Google Ads campaign portfolio: a sortable, filterable campaign table with a rule-based triage layer (attention banner, per-row severity badges, needs-attention filter, sort-by-priority), a by-type spend/ROAS breakdown, per-campaign and portfolio AI evaluation report cards with a score timeline, and a hook that syncs data and runs evaluations with per-row busy state.

contexts.name: Campaign Sync & Evaluation API
contexts.description: Server routes that sync Google Ads campaigns from the connector into SQLite (GET state / POST sync) and run a single-campaign or whole-portfolio AI evaluation, persisting each report so it matches the data on screen.

contexts.name: Google Ads Connector & SQLite Store
contexts.description: The data layer for campaigns: a Google Ads connector with a deterministic sample provider (and a ready seam for live credentials), plus a node:sqlite store that persists synced campaigns and AI reports to a local file with no native build step.

contexts.name: Campaign Model & AI Prompts
contexts.description: Framework-free campaign domain model (types, derived metrics, aggregation, by-type grouping, agreed PNO/ROAS targets), a pure rule-based triage/severity helper that flags rule-breaching campaigns and ranks where attention is due, and the prompt builders that turn synced numbers into grounded per-campaign and portfolio evaluation prompts.

contexts.name: Design System, Icons & Charts
contexts.description: Reusable visual primitives shared across every page: layout/typography building blocks (Container, Eyebrow, Pill), the SVG icon set, the dependency-free Sparkline, global Tailwind styles, the favicon, and a living /design-system showcase generated from the @theme token names so it never drifts, with a Playwright visual-regression baseline.

contexts.name: Czech Formatting Helpers
contexts.description: Centralised Czech-locale formatting helpers (currency, percent, signed deltas, multiples, dates, relative time, collapsed date ranges, and screen-reader-safe compact/aria pairs) so every page and every AI prompt renders numbers identically.

contexts.name: Build & Tooling Config
contexts.description: Project build and tooling configuration: dependencies and npm scripts (including the composite check gate), TypeScript/Next.js/ESLint/PostCSS-Tailwind setup, the Playwright config, the quality gate (Husky pre-commit, lint-staged, GitHub Actions CI mirroring npm run check), and the repo README + env example.
